name: kbve-spider
title: KBVE Spider
author: kbve
description: Adds a custom isometric pre-rendered spider as a hostile unit. 16-direction body+shadow sprites with idle / walk / run / attack / death / hit / nervous animations. Spider model: 'Animated Isometric Pale Spider' by engvee (https://engvee.itch.io/animated-isometric-pale-spider). Music by OpenFret (https://openfret.com).
